Description: Wraith Blade — a spectral sword cuts through armor, dealing dark physical damage.
DescriptionEn: Wraith Blade — a spectral sword cuts through armor, dealing dark physical damage.
DescriptionFr: Lame du Spectre — une épée spectrale transperce l'armure, infligeant de sombres dégâts physiques.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 220 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 220 physical damage to one enemy.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 220 dégâts physiques à un ennemi.
